title: Tarotoo Tarot Card Meanings (All 78 Cards)
subtitle: All 78 tarot cards: meanings, keywords, love, career, planet, zodiac, yes/no
description:
A complete, structured dataset of all 78 tarot cards (22 Major Arcana + 56 Minor Arcana) in the Rider-Waite-Smith tradition, published by Tarotoo (tarotoo.com) as part of its AI transparency initiative. Each card includes upright and reversed meanings, keywords, love and career contexts, planet and zodiac associations (Golden Dawn attributions), a yes/no value for yes-or-no readings, and a link to each card's meaning page on tarotoo.com.

Fields: id, name, arcana, suit, number_numerology, element, planet, zodiac, yes_no, keywords_upright, keywords_reversed, meaning_upright, meaning_reversed, love, career, mood, spiritual, url.

Source of truth: https://github.com/Tarotoo-com/tarotoo-tarot-dataset
DOI: https://doi.org/10.5281/zenodo.21268290
MCP server: https://github.com/Tarotoo-com/tarotoo-mcp-server

License: MIT. For entertainment and self-reflection purposes only.

resources.description: All 78 tarot cards, one row per card (keywords joined with '; ')
Canonical JSON: array of 78 card objects
